tools.name: list_releases
tools.description: List AI model and product releases tracked by AI-Portal, newest first. Filter by category, provider, year, or landmark releases only.

tools.name: list_regulations
tools.description: List AI regulations and their compliance status (EU AI Act, ISO 42001, and more), including jurisdiction, effective dates, key requirements, and fines.

tools.name: search_glossary
tools.description: Search AI-Portal's glossary of AI/GenAI terms. Returns term, definition, category, and a usage example.

tools.name: get_latest_news
tools.description: Latest curated GenAI news items from AI-Portal, refreshed every weekday morning.
